recommended_actions.name: send_message
recommended_actions.summary: Send a direct message to 张三 / zhangsan.
use_when: Notify 张三 about a meeting, incident update, or follow-up.
User asks to tell 张三 / zhangsan / 老张 something.

recommended_actions.name: enter_scope
recommended_actions.summary: Switch the mounted app tree to another scope before reading or acting.
use_when: Need chat-long instead of the default chat-001 view.

recommended_actions.name: refresh_structure
recommended_actions.summary: Refresh the app tree after scope-sensitive changes or connector updates.
use_when: App layout may have changed and paths should be reloaded.
